title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 30 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 30/07/2024
Image reference: 2024-07-30_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-july-30-2024_img1.png
Bulkers: S&P Values for older Capesizes see downward correction owing to sales such as C Vision, modernPanamaxes increase due to sales such as Kristian Oldendorff
Capesize BC C Vision (173,700 DWT, Mar 2008, Bohai) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 21 mil, VV Value USD 22.56 mil
Panamax BC Kristian Oldendorff (82,000 DWT, Feb 2024, Jiangsu New Hantong) sold to HMM for USD 40.85 mil VV Value USD 40.0 mil
Supramax BC Royal Samurai (58,100 DWT, Dec 2010, Tsuneishi Cebu) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 17.5 mil VV Value USD 17.8 mil
Handy BC Coreleader (37,000 DWT, Oct 2012, Saiki) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 17.1 mil VV Value USD 17.8 mil
Tankers: Tanker values remaining stable with older tonnage Suezmax values firming slightly last week despite softening earnings
MR2 (Chemical/Product) Green Sea (50,900 DWT, May 2014, Dae Sun) sold SS/DD Passed to undisclosed buyers for USD 38.75 mil, VV Value USD 37.54 mil
Small Clean (Bunkering) Pearl Maya (8,000 DWT, Aug 2019, Bohai Shipbuilding HI Co) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 16.5 mil, VV Value
